title: Sully's Mod & Species Compat
description: Compatibility between Sully's mod and Species, which will expand the possibilities of archeology!
body:
Added:
- Ancient skulls, fossils, a petrified log, a petrified sapling, piranha teeth and a tortoise scute in paleontology.
- Now fossilized eggs can only be found in the archaeology of petrified trees.
- Ancient pinecones can be found in the archaeology of petrified trees.
- Stackatick can be found in amber.

This datapack will be updated if I find new ways to combine mods :P
